title: ErrorDetail
description: Error associated with a failed Digital Payment Application (DPA) item action.

reason.description: Reason for receiving an error for the Digital Payment Application (DPA) item.

sourceType.description: Indicates the source type of the Digital Payment Application (DPA) item error.

message.description: Additional details on the Digital Payment Application (DPA) item error.

source.description: Indicates the field name for the cause of the Digital Payment Application (DPA) item error.
